top_strength: Exceptionally thorough probe — walked Sony room-by-room, caught the washer/dryer and patio items customer forgot, and asked about moving stressors.
coaching_note: Transcript truncated before pricing/SYA/booking — full assessment not possible; no agenda statement set even after the warm transfer.
phone_presence_notes: Warm and patient through detailed inventory walkthrough; apologizing for daughter in background and keeping Sony comfortable showed genuine interpersonal skill.
